ECO ENVIRONMENTAL SERVICES LLC
Corporate Profile

COMPANY OVERVIEW
Eco Environmental Services LLC is a leading environmental consultancy firm based in Dubai, UAE. Established in 2005, we serve clients across the GCC region.

CORE SERVICE PORTFOLIO
• Environmental Impact Assessments
• Waste Management Solutions
• Air Quality Monitoring
• Water Treatment Consulting
• Sustainability Reporting

SECTORS SERVED
• Oil & Gas
• Construction
• Manufacturing
• Hospitality
• Government

WHY CLIENTS CHOOSE US
We have completed 500+ projects across the UAE. Our team of 45 certified professionals delivers excellence in every engagement.

CLIENT BASE
ADNOC, Dubai Holding, Emaar, DEWA, and 200+ other organisations.

CONTACT
